zh.pageTitle: 转座元件知识图谱演示
zh.footer: 演示页使用本地导出的 Neo4j 子图数据，不依赖在线接口。
zh.empty: 点击节点或连线查看图谱详情。
zh.noneLocal: 当前没有检索到本地证据。
zh.intro:
当前演示页已接入本地图谱子图。你可以提问：
“LINE-1 相关功能”
“LINE-1 相关疾病”
“L1HS 和 LINE-1 是什么关系”
“哪些文献支持 LINE-1 与阿尔茨海默病相关”
zh.f: 根据当前本地图谱，LINE-1 主要涉及：
zh.d: 根据当前本地图谱，LINE-1 与以下疾病关系较突出：
zh.lp: 当前图谱已为 L1HS 整理出本地文献证据。
zh.pp: 当前图谱已为 LINE-1 整理出本地文献证据。
zh.fallback: 当前演示页支持围绕 LINE-1 的功能、疾病、谱系关系和文献证据查询。
zh.focusHint: 高聚焦会更像手动滚轮放大
zh.fixedTip: 固定视图已开启：点击节点或连线仅查看详情，不跳转图谱。

en.search: Search LINE-1, L1HS, diseases, or functions
en.footer: This demo uses a locally exported Neo4j subgraph and does not depend on online services.
en.empty: Click a node or edge to inspect graph details.
en.intro:
This demo is grounded on a local graph subnetwork. You can ask:
"LINE-1 related functions"
"LINE-1 related diseases"
"What is the relationship between L1HS and LINE-1?"
"What papers support the association between LINE-1 and Alzheimer's disease?"
en.f: Based on the current local graph, LINE-1 is mainly involved in:
en.d: Based on the current local graph, LINE-1 is notably associated with:
en.lp: The current graph already includes local literature evidence for L1HS.
en.pp: The current graph already includes local literature evidence for LINE-1.
en.fallback: This demo currently supports LINE-1-centered questions about functions, diseases, lineage relations, and literature evidence.
en.focusHint: Higher focus behaves more like repeated wheel zoom
en.fixedTip: Fixed view is enabled: clicking nodes or edges only shows details without changing the graph.
